description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: During the transitioning phase, before StarGuard is fully implemented and tested, only the Spark Agent will use the process specified in [A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3.1 - Execution Through StarGuard](78ec918d-cd9e-4326-bfa9-ab338e658a8b). Other Agent Spells will use the process specified in [A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3.2 - Direct Execution Through Sky Core Spell](ffc88a5e-b7b2-4ed9-8c88-fcbcb7632f14).
description: Do not merge unless associated poll passes
